reviews.comment: Nick Tripp’s background of expeditious responsiveness is evident in all his professional interactions:  planning, scheduling, instructing, completing/producing all important AED CPR First Aid for medical professionals and non medical professionals certification documentation quickly & efficiently.   He always responds; when scheduling became crunched he made time and generously rearranged his schedule to accommodate.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Jennifer!  We are pleased that your experience was better than just 'acceptable'.   We look forward to working with for years to come.

reviews.comment: I completely enjoyed my experience here! The building is full of awesome people who create an unremarkable environment to be in!!! I can't wait to start my  Phlebotomy Tech Class with them! If I could give them more than 5 stars I would!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Brittani!   Now that you've started your program, I hope your experiences have exceeded your initial observations.   We appreciate your allowing us to be a part of your training.

reviews.comment: I renewed my BLS certification in Holly Ridge NC with Ms. Lea,  and it was beyond my expectations.  This is a wonderful company to complete your BLS or any other CPR certifications with. Thank you Coastal Carolina CPR and Ms. Lea for a wonderful CPR experience.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for your review, Megon!  I will definitely share your comments with Lea.  She is fun and full of energy!  We look forward to working for you for years to come.  Have a great weekend.

reviews.comment: I realized last minute on the weekend that I needed to become up to date on my CPR to help give vaccines. I am glad I found Coastal Carolina CPR because they had multiple classes and time slots I could choose. That same night I had a good class and was re certified and I will recommend them to friends and coworkers.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Amy.  I am glad you had a good experience and were able to get this competed.  Best wishes and "thank you" for answering the call to care for our community.

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LU52NEt3EAE

reviews.comment: Had a wonderful experience taking the BLS class with Brian. He was very knowledgeable and easy to be open with if I didn't understand something. It was a very professional atmosphere and I felt confident in my skills when I left.

reviewReply.comment: Your feedback is important!   Thank you, Pat!  It was nice to meet you.  We send our best wishes to you on your upcoming adventures.  Thank you for your willingness to 'get back to the grind' for the betterment of the community.  Stay safe!  Look forward to working with you again soon.

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTLWNEbW5RRRAB

reviews.comment: I recently had to renew My BLS for work. I have to say this place is awesome! Brian my instructor was so nice and very professional. Not only that, you could definitely tell he had tons of experience and at no point was he judgemental when you felt like you did something incorrectly. Brian was right by my side making sure I felt confident if ever I needed to perform CPR. I would hands down refer anyone to this place of business. Thanks so much to the crew at Coastal Carolina CPR!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Crystal.  It was a pleasure to meet you and look forward to working with you again in the future.  Have a great happy New Year and successful 2021.

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTd2Fqem9nRRAB

reviews.comment: I had a great experience at Coastal Carolina CPR. They are very professional and knowledgeable. The class sizes are small, making it possible to get one-on-one help when needed. They are able to adjust the course material based on the prior knowledge of those attending the class. I would highly recommend everyone to come here for CPR classes.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Sydni!  Your feedback is very important and we greatly appreciate your time to share.  It was nice to meet you and look forward to working with you again.

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTX3ZpYVVREAE

reviews.comment:
I am very thankful to the staff of Coastal Carolina CPR in providing the information and training it takes to become a BLS instructor. They provided me with the knowledge and the skills I need to put into practice and to teach the life saving techniques developed by the American Heart Association . I look forward to serving.
Donna B McIntire

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Donna.  We glad you have the information to be confident in your classes!   We look forward to being a resource as you get your program ramped up.  Happy New Year!

reviews.name: accounts/113447197806150947083/locations/8102268822080792056/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTbXRuZW93RRAB

reviews.comment: I had an amazing experience at  Coastal Carolina CPR! I would highly recommend getting certified through them. They have time slots that work with the busiest of schedules which was a blessing!! I was able to schedule a class for the very next day. The instructor was very knowledgeable and created a positive learning environment! Its safe to say when my renewal time comes around again this is where I'll go

reviewReply.comment: Thank you, Ms. Hinds.  Your kind words are greatly appreciated!   We look forward to working with you again also.

reviews.comment: we’re very nice and helpful with making sure I had the right certificates and forms for the coast guard approved class I needed! From the first phone call to the time I finished the class they made the process go smoothly for me! 🙂

reviewReply.comment:
Meagan, thank you for the feedback.  I'm glad you were finally able to get the materials your needed.  Congrats and our best to you on your advancement at work!   🎣 🎣🎣

We also appreciate your bringing to our attention that a program we have been offering has been recognize by the Coast Guard as meeting the Captains License's First Aid / CPR requirement.  Thank you.

(For more info, visit: http://bit.ly/GMB_CGFA )
